name: Smoked Salmon Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) Atlantic Salmon in Water, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheeses and finely chopped green onions.
2. Add the drained salmon and mix well.
3. Stir in liquid smoke and pepper according to taste.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
